text: Doctor ne bol diya ki ye bas stress hai par mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona nikal raha hai, mujhe gaon ki bohot yaad aa rahi hai. Is bade shehar mein bhasha ki vajah se koi mera dukh nahi samajhta, bas aisa lag raha hai jaise main kisi gahre gaddhe mein gir raha hoon. Abhi main remittance ya naukri ke baare mein kuch nahi soch sakta, bas ye ghutan khatam ho jaye kaise bhi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona nikal raha hai
text: Haan yaar, samajh nahi aata kya ho raha hai mere saath. Raat ko neend nahi aati, subah uthne ka mann nahi karta. Bas leta rehta hoon. Office waale call karte hain toh phone dekh ke rakh deta hoon. Kuch karne ki himmat hi nahi hoti.

Lait ke rehna, phone uthane ki bhi shakti na hona — yeh sab milake bata rahe hain ki kaafi waqt se yeh bojh uthaa rahe ho tum akele. Kitne din se aisa chal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag sunn ho gaya hai aur bas rona nikal raha hai
text: Kaafi mahine ho gaye hain yahan aaye. Pehle theek tha, kaam mein busy rehta tha toh dhyan nahi jaata tha. Par ab... pata nahi kab se aisa ho gaya. Yahaan ke log toh Hindi bhi theek se nahi bolte, aur main unki bhasha nahi samajhta. Toh kya boloon, kisse boloon? Mess mein bhi sab apne apne groups mein rehte hain.

coping_shade_signal: rona nikal raha hai
text: Haan bilkul wahi. Aur gaon ki yaad kuch alag hi hoti hai. Wahan Amma ka haath ka khaana tha, padosi log the, apna aangan tha. Yahaan sirf ek kamra hai aur khidki ke bahar koi jaana-pehchana nahi. Kabhi kabhi raat ko gaon ki galiyon ka sapna aata hai... uthta hoon toh aur bura lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona nikal raha hai
text: Haan... bilkul wahi. Aur kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta na ghar mein. Ghar waalon ko pata chalega toh tension lenge, bolenge 'wapas aa jao' ya 'itna kamzor kyun hai tu.' Paisa bhejna band ho jayega toh woh bhi mushkil. Mard hoke rona? Log kya kahenge.

coping_shade_signal: ghutan khatam ho jaye
text: Haan yaar, bahut thak gaya hoon. Baahar se sab normal dikhna padta hai, office mein log samjhenge nahi, aur andar se yeh ghutan... pata nahi kab se hai. Doctor ne bhi keh diya 'stress hai, relax karo' — par kaise? Yahaan toh saans bhi nahi khulti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan khatam ho jaye

text: Yeh sun ke thoda... achha laga shayad. Ki sirf main nahi hoon. Par phir bhi na — karna kya hai? Aise hi rona aur sona chalta rahega? Kuch hai kya jo thoda sa aasaan kar sake? Koi raasta hai kya is ghutan se?

text:
Achha suno — kuch cheezein hain jo bahut badi nahi hain, par is ghutan ko thoda sa hawa dene mein kaam aa sakti hain. Teen options hain, jo tumhe sahi lage woh chunna:

Pehla — Amma ya Baba ko sirf ek baar call karna, sirf unki awaaz sunne ke liye. Koi problem share karne ki zaroorat nahi — bas 'kaisa chal raha hai' wali baat. Kabhi kabhi woh awaaz hi kuch khol deti hai andar se.

Doosra — Raat ko sone se pehle, ek kagaz pe sirf teen cheezein likhna — aaj kya hua, andar kya chala, aur gaon ki ek memory. Hindi mein, jaise bolte ho waisa. Kisi ke liye nahi, sirf apne liye.

Aur teesra — Agar kabhi lagta hai ki yeh andar ki ghutan zyaada ho rahi hai aur koi baat karna ho, toh iCall ka ek number hai — 9152987821 — jahan Hindi mein baat kar sakte hain. Paisa nahi lagta, aur jo bhi bolte hain woh bahar nahi jaata. Koi judge nahi karta wahaan. Yeh abhi zaroor nahi hai, par rakhna apne paas.

Kaunsi cheez thodi possible lagti hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutan khatam ho jaye
text: Amma ko call karna... haan woh toh kar sakta hoon. speaker: Supporter

text:
Yeh karo — aaj kaam ke baad jab thoda sa quiet time mile, kamre mein akele baitho. Phone uthao. Amma ka number lagao. 

Jab call uthaayein, pehle sirf bolna — 'Amma, aapki yaad aa rahi thi.' Bas itna. Baaki woh khud sambhal lengi — woh poochhegi, batayengi, shayad kuch gaon ka sunayengi. Tum sirf sunna. Jawab dena, haan ya hoon karte rehna. Solve kuch nahi karna, sirf woh awaaz sunni hai.

Callkhatam hone ke baad, ek minute ke liye aankhein band karna. Bas itna.

Yeh aaj ke liye kaafi hai.
